name: Three Broomsticks
added: ## Stay & Dine with a * Hotel Dining Credit

Introductory Ticket Offer Get 7 Days of Park Awesome for the Price of 5 Days* Vacation like never before and enjoy summer savings with a week of excitement for the price of a 5-Day Ticket. Get ready for Universal Orlando Resort’s four amazing theme parks. *Ticket prices and availability vary by day. Restrictions apply. Get Details Learn More
## Get 7 Days of Park Awesome for the Price of 5 Days*

Vacation Package Save More with a Vacation Package Enjoy the most savings when you book a Universal Orlando vacation package including a 7-Day Ticket for the price of 5 days**. You'll also get a * hotel dining credit on a 5-Night or more stay at select Universal Orlando Resort hotels. Plus you'll also save up to ^ with an automatic Bundle and Save discount. *Based on a 5-night stay at select hotels. Limited availability. Restrictions apply. **Ticket prices and availability vary by day. Restrictions apply. ^Savings based on a 7-night stay. Select dates. Restrictions apply. Get Details Explore Package
## Save More with a Vacation Package

Florida Residents Florida Resident Passes From Less Than Per Month* After Down Payment This changes everything. Experience the thrills of Universal Studios Florida and Universal Islands of Adventure again and again with this Florida Resident Pass offer. Total Price plus tax *FL Resident 2-Park Seasonal Pass. FlexPay: down (tax inclusive), plus 11 monthly payments of (0% APR). Renews automatically. Blockout dates and restrictions apply. View Details Buy Now
## Florida Resident Passes From Less Than Per Month* After Down Payment

Florida Residents Save * on a 3-Day Park-to-Park Ticket This changes everything. Roam freely between Universal Epic Universe, Universal Studios Florida and Universal Islands of Adventure as you laugh, scream and vacation like never before with exclusive Florida resident savings. *Not available at the front gate. Use by Dec. 31, 2026. Restrictions apply. Get Details Buy Now
## Save * on a 3-Day Park-to-Park Ticket

Volcano Bay Nights Slide into an exclusive family-friendly event with rides, a live DJ and DreamWorks character meet and greets on select nights. Experience Universal Volcano Bay with an unforgettable nighttime beach party vibe. Universal Volcano Bay Nights is a separately-ticketed event held on select nights. Restrictions apply. Get Details Buy Now
## Volcano Bay Nights

Event Tickets Get Admission to Halloween Horror Nights Choose a night to experience the terror of The World’s Premier Halloween Event#. Buy online and save. #Named the “Golden Ticket Legend for Best Halloween Event” by Amusement Today. Savings vs front gate. Applies to select event admission tickets only. Pricing varies by date, subject to availability and to change until purchased. Exclusions and restrictions apply. Get Details Buy Now
## Get Admission to Halloween Horror Nights

Event Add-ons Enhance the Horror at Halloween Horror Nights Get to the fear faster with a Halloween Horror Nights Express Pass. Follow a VIP guide into the darkness with an R.I.P. Tour. Start your thrills sooner with a Scream Early Ticket. Or go inside with a Behind the Screams: Unmasking the Horror Tour. Get Details Buy Now
## Enhance the Horror at Halloween Horror Nights

Exclusive Event Halloween Horror Nights Premium Scream Night Event Nights: Aug. 27 or Oct. 19, 2026 Experience Halloween Horror Nights in a killer way. With shorter wait times compared to regular event nights plus select all-you-care-to-enjoy food, this is where horror lives the high life. Limited capacity. Subject to availability. Restrictions apply. Get Details Buy Now
## Halloween Horror Nights Premium Scream Night Event Nights: Aug. 27 or Oct. 19, 2026

Florida Resident Hotel Savings Save Up to 25%* at Universal Orlando Hotels Relaxation or excitement? Here, you don’t have to choose. A Universal hotel is an oasis in the middle of your getaway. And as a Florida Resident, you can save up to 25%* off your stay at participating hotels. *Savings vary by participating hotel based on availability. Restrictions apply. Get Details Book Now
## Save Up to 25%* at Universal Orlando Hotels
## Earn a Statement Credit*

Bundle and Save on a Universal Vacation Bundle your hotel and theme park tickets to customize a Universal Orlando vacation package and save up to ^. The longer you stay, the more you save. ^Savings based on a 7-night stay. Select dates. Restrictions apply. View Details Explore Package
## Bundle and Save on a Universal Vacation
Don't Miss a Beat at Universal Orlando
## Peacock Series: Epic Ride​
## Find Your Oasis in the Middle of the Action
## Butterbeer™ Season in The Wizarding World of Harry Potter™
Fanny Pack
Explore Universal Orlando Resort
Three Iconic Worlds. One Unforgettable Experience.
Universal Orlando Resort Hotels

When you stay at Universal Orlando Resort, you're getting much more than an awesome hotel room in an amazingly themed resort. Your hotel is an extension of the action, where you're always just minutes away from the theme parks. Wherever you are, the vacation keeps going.

Signature Collection Universal Helios Grand Hotel, a Loews Hotel Now Open Step into a sunlit sanctuary, where light and life abound. Rising above the waters of Celestial Park, Universal Helios Grand Hotel, puts you at Universal Epic Universe. Explore
## Universal Helios Grand Hotel, a Loews Hotel

Signature Collection Loews Portofino Bay Hotel Relax in beautiful, timeless surroundings inspired by the seaside village of Portofino, Italy. Wonderfully appointed rooms and suites combine with delights of every flavor to create the perfect family escape. Explore
## Loews Portofino Bay Hotel
Value Inns and Suites Universal Cabana Bay Beach Resort Enjoy vibrant, retro-style with rooms and suites brilliantly designed for fun and affordability. Explore
## Universal Cabana Bay Beach Resort

Prime Value Hotels Universal Aventura Hotel Experience a fresh and fun way to stay, with commanding views of all of Universal Orlando Resort. A sleek, stylish, perfectly priced escape that's just plain cool. Explore
## Universal Aventura Hotel

Value Inns and Suites Universal Endless Summer Resort - Dockside Inn and Suites It's all good. Universal Endless Summer Resort Dockside Inn and Suites lets you soak up the scenes of a serene escape and save with extra affordable rates - all in the middle of a Universal Orlando Resort vacation. Explore
## Universal Endless Summer Resort - Dockside Inn and Suites

Value Inns and Suites Universal Endless Summer Resort - Surfside Inn and Suites Step into the casual, free-spirited lifestyle of surf culture at Universal Endless Summer Resort Surfside Inn and Suites for an extra affordable Universal vacation. Explore
## Universal Endless Summer Resort - Surfside Inn and Suites

Signature Collection Loews Sapphire Falls Resort Step into paradise in the heart of the tropics. Blue waterfalls cascade over lush grounds and, in the distance, the calming sounds of steel drums call you to take in the scenic views, ease into island time and let go Explore
## Loews Sapphire Falls Resort
Signature Collection Loews Royal Pacific Resort Be swept away to a South Seas escape filled with tropical wonders, exotic food and carefree fun. Explore
## Loews Royal Pacific Resort
Signature Collection Hard Rock Hotel® Live like a star and get treated like a celebrity with impeccable surroundings, laid-back attitude and show-stopping service. Explore
## Hard Rock Hotel®

Prime Value Hotels Universal Stella Nova Resort Now Open This resort is where you ll take off for amazing adventures and exclusive theme park benefits at the parks; it's also where you'll touch down for relaxation and recharging between the fun. Explore
## Universal Stella Nova Resort

Prime Value Hotels Universal Terra Luna Resort Now Open This resort is much more than your launchpad into amazing adventures and exclusive theme park benefits; it s also your landing zone for relaxation and recharging between the fun. Explore
## Universal Terra Luna Resort
## Be Among the First to Know What's Next
Customize preferences to receive offers, discounts, and updates.
Receive park notifications, maps, and ride info while in the park.
Breeze through your online checkout journey.

Universal Orlando Resort Hotels

When you stay at Universal Orlando Resort, you're getting much more than an awesome hotel room in an amazingly themed resort. Your hotel is an extension of the action, where you're always just minutes away from the theme parks. Wherever you are, the vacation keeps going.

Signature Collection Universal Helios Grand Hotel, a Loews Hotel Now Open Step into a sunlit sanctuary, where light and life abound. Rising above the waters of Celestial Park, Universal Helios Grand Hotel, puts you at Universal Epic Universe. Explore
## Universal Helios Grand Hotel, a Loews Hotel

Signature Collection Loews Portofino Bay Hotel Relax in beautiful, timeless surroundings inspired by the seaside village of Portofino, Italy. Wonderfully appointed rooms and suites combine with delights of every flavor to create the perfect family escape. Explore
## Loews Portofino Bay Hotel
Value Inns and Suites Universal Cabana Bay Beach Resort Enjoy vibrant, retro-style with rooms and suites brilliantly designed for fun and affordability. Explore
## Universal Cabana Bay Beach Resort

Prime Value Hotels Universal Aventura Hotel Experience a fresh and fun way to stay, with commanding views of all of Universal Orlando Resort. A sleek, stylish, perfectly priced escape that's just plain cool. Explore
## Universal Aventura Hotel

Value Inns and Suites Universal Endless Summer Resort - Dockside Inn and Suites It's all good. Universal Endless Summer Resort Dockside Inn and Suites lets you soak up the scenes of a serene escape and save with extra affordable rates - all in the middle of a Universal Orlando Resort vacation. Explore
## Universal Endless Summer Resort - Dockside Inn and Suites

## Universal Endless Summer Resort - Surfside Inn and Suites

Signature Collection Loews Sapphire Falls Resort Step into paradise in the heart of the tropics. Blue waterfalls cascade over lush grounds and, in the distance, the calming sounds of steel drums call you to take in the scenic views, ease into island time and let go Explore

Signature Collection Loews Royal Pacific Resort Be swept away to a South Seas escape filled with tropical wonders, exotic food and carefree fun. Explore

## Universal Stella Nova Resort

## Manage Consent Preferences
Selling, Sharing, Targeted Advertising

If you are not logged in, your opt-out will be specific to this property and device or browser. For our other digital properties, to opt out, select “Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information” or “Your Privacy Choices” on each. If you clear your tracking history or use another browser or device, you’ll need to opt out again.You can also submit this opt-out form, which may enable us to apply your opt-out more broadly, for example, to stop data sharing in connection with advertising intended to reach you on platforms not operated by Disney (e.g., social media platforms). You may enable online, where available, a universal tool that automatically communicates your opt-out, such as Global Privacy Control (“GPC”), which we’ll process as if you had opted out through the toggle.Even if you opt out, you may continue to see advertising, including ads that may be based on personal information processed before you opted out. Please visit Your US State Privacy Rights for more information about your rights and how to exercise them.
